_note: Operator config for MrOracle release/39. Each pool entry must list the custody pubkeys in the exact order of pool.custodies[] on-chain (ops can query via `adrena cli pool get`). The providers array drives which DB pollers are required and which provider batches must be collected before firing update_pool_aum. The 5-second collection window is hardcoded in src/pool_config.rs (COLLECTION_WINDOW).

pools.name: main-pool
pools._address_comment: Mainnet main-pool PDA. Custody order matches pool.custodies[]: [USDC, BONK, jitoSOL, WBTC].
